allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:', d['total']\); [print\('  -', c['name'], '|', c['year'], '|', c.get\('marque',{}\).get\('name','NO_MARQUE'\), '| slug:', c['slug']\) for c in d['data'][:5]]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); cars=d['data']; print\('total:', len\(cars\)\); all_porsche=all\(c.get\('marque',{}\).get\('name',''\)=='Porsche' for c in cars\); print\('all Porsche:', all_porsche\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const years=j.data.map\(c=>c.year\); console.log\('years:',years\); console.log\('asc ok:',years[0]<=years[years.length-1]\)")
